api_key.description: Onfleet API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username with an empty password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Onfleet API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages for the paginated tasks stream; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
